metadata.title: Turning a 3v2 Site Push Into a Clean Win with Smart Angles in VALORANT
metadata.description:
Watch how smart positioning and timing swing this intense 3v2 site take. Notice the quick peeks and steady aim that seal the round. What’s your favorite spot to hold under pressure?

Got a clutch like this? Share your best plays in the comments!

#shorts #valorant #gaming #clutch #fps
